chunks.title: Declaration of Integrity and Love for God's House
chunks.reason: A unified declaration where the psalmist asserts personal integrity, describes his separation from the wicked, and expresses love for the temple.

chunks.title: Prayer for Deliverance and Thanksgiving
chunks.reason: A plea for God to spare the psalmist from sinners and a concluding statement of standing firm to bless Yahweh in the congregation.
